sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٢٦٠٧].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Držite se istine, jer istina vodi ka dobročinstvu' [Muslim].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) said: 'Adhere to truthfulness, for truthfulness leads to righteousness' [Muslim].

sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ خُلُقٌ عَظِيمٌ يُمَيِّزُ الْمُؤْمِنَ الصَّادِقَ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost je plemenit moral koji odlikuje iskrenog vjernika u njegovom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is a great character trait that distinguishes the sincere believer in his life.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَتَكَلَّمُ الْمُسْلِمُ بِالْحَقِّ، يَكْسِبُ ثِقَةَ النَّاسِ وَرِضَا اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ.
sentences.translation: Kada musliman govori istinu, on stiče povjerenje ljudi i zadovoljstvo Allaha Uzvišenog.
sentences.translationEn: When a Muslim speaks the truth, he gains the trust of people and the pleasure of Allah Almighty.

sentences.arabic: الْكَذِبُ صِفَةٌ سَيِّئَةٌ تَبْتَعِدُ عَنِ الْإِيمَانِ وَتُؤَدِّي إِلَى الْمَشَاكِلِ.
sentences.translation: Laž je loša osobina koja je daleko od imana i vodi ka problemima.
sentences.translationEn: Lying is a bad trait that is far from faith and leads to problems.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، نَحْنُ نَتَعَلَّمُ أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ طَرِيقٌ مُخْتَصَرٌ لِدُخُولِ الْجَنَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga učimo da je istina direktan put ka ulasku u Džennet.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we learn that honesty is a direct path to entering Paradise.
